sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95394" key="skufokw/naktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠφο-κώνακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95394.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carried round in cups</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">93</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
